issue.title: [>= 5.52.0] Error when overriding derived using onclick handlers of custom button components
issue.body:
### Describe the bug Overriding derived variables using click handlers of custom button components, for example [bits ui button](https://bits-ui.com/docs/components/button), raises unexpected errors. This does not allow to upgrade svelte version to >= 5.52.0. **Example code:** ```svelte { likes++; }}> 🧡 {likes} ``` ```svelte

Welcome to SvelteKit

Visit svelte.dev/docs/kit to read the documentation

``` ### Reproduction https://github.com/[sukeshpabolu/derived-override-bug](https://github.com/sukeshpabolu/derived-override-bug) - install dependencies using command similar to `pnpm install` - run dev server using command similar to `pnpm dev` - Open dev server in the browser to see the error or in the terminal. ### Logs ```shell RollupError: Parse failure: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access. At file: /src/lib/components/Post.svelte:18:6 at getRollupError (file:///C:/Users/abcdefg/Documents/sveltekit-increment-bug/node_modules/.pnpm/rollup@4.58.0/node_modules/rollup/dist/es/shared/parseAst.js:402:41) at convertProgram (file:///C:/Users/abcdefg/Documents/sveltekit-increment-bug/node_modules/.pnpm/rollup@4.58.0/node_modules/rollup/dist/es/shared/parseAst.js:1108:26) at parseAstAsync (file:///C:/Users/abcdefg/Documents/sveltekit-increment-bug/node_modules/.pnpm/rollup@4.58.0/node_modules/rollup/dist/es/shared/parseAst.js:2094:106) at async ssrTransformScript (file:///C:/Users/abcdefg/Documents/sveltekit-increment-bug/node_modules/.pnpm/vite@7.3.1_jiti@2.6.1_lightningcss@1.31.1/node_modules/vite/dist/node/chunks/config.js:15374:9) at async loadAndTransform (file:///C:/Users/abcdefg/Documents/sveltekit-increment-bug/node_modules/.pnpm/vite@7.3.1_jiti@2.6.1_lightningcss@1.31.1/node_modules/vite/dist/node/chunks/config.js:22701:64) ``` ### System Info ```shell System: OS: Windows 10 10.0.19045 CPU: (8) x64 11th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-1145G7 @ 2.60GHz Memory: 2.99 GB / 15.73 GB Binaries: Node: 22.22.0 - C:\Users\abcdefg\nodejs\node.EXE Yarn: 1.22.22 - C:\Users\abcdefg\nodejs\yarn.CMD npm: 10.9.4 - C:\Users\abcdefg\nodejs\npm.CMD pnpm: 10.29.3 - C:\Users\abcdefg\nodejs\pnpm.CMD bun: 1.3.8 - C:\Users\abcdefg\.bun\bin\bun.EXE Deno: 2.5.4 - C:\Users\abcdefg\.deno\bin\deno.EXE Browsers: Edge: Chromium (143.0.3650.80) Firefox: 133.0.3 - C:\Program Files\Mozilla Firefox\firefox.exe Internet Explorer: 11.0.19041.5794 npmPackages: svelte: ^5.53.0 => 5.53.0 ``` ### Severity blocking an upgrade
